title: Update containerd
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

In 1.7.19, containerd spun out its platforms package into its own repository.  Update to use the new repository.

#### How to verify it

Check if things still compile, and if tests pass.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

This will obsolete #5616.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
LGTM
but it looks like a rebase is needed.
